PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?countryLabel ?medalLabel WHERE {
  ?medal wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q1788716 .
  ?medal wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?medal rdfs:label ?medalLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?medalLabel) = "en")
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  OPTIONAL {
    ?medal schema:description ?desc .
    FILTER(LANG(?desc) = "en")
  }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?desc) , "highest military") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?medalLabel) , "medal of honor") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?medalLabel) , "victoria cross") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?medalLabel) , "param vir chakra") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?medalLabel) , "scharnhorst order") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?medalLabel) , "obelix medal"))
}
ORDER BY ?countryLabel
LIMIT 50
